creator: dchagin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here a new linux_kdump source which supports latest changes like ktrace/kdump (show the description of ABI of traced process):
http://people.freebsd.org/~dchagin/linux_kdump-1.6.tar.gz

Here a patch to the linux_kdump port:
http://people.freebsd.org/~dchagin/linux_kdump.patch
